title: AI #172: The First Fable
whyItMatters: A lot happened this week, including a great trip out to Lighthaven. The main event, the one that matters, was the release of Claude Fable 5. The public now has its hands on a Mythos-class model, alongside strong safeguards. As always with a new model, I take a few days to draw in reactions, try out the model and read the system card, before I offer my takes…
